articles.author: Abigail Williams, Julie Cerullo
articles.title: Americans urged to leave Middle East, but many airports are closed and embassy staff is reduced - NBC News
articles.description: The weekend strikes against Iran have caused massive disruptions to U.S. embassies and consulates throughout the Middle East.
articles.content: The State Department on Tuesday ordered the mandatory departure of non-emergency personnel and family members in six countries in the Middle East over growing security concerns, after the U.S. Embass… [+4366 chars]

articles.author: Berkeley Lovelace Jr.
articles.title: GLP-1s may increase risk of osteoporosis and gout, new research finds - NBC News
articles.description: GLP-1 drugs — including Ozempic and Wegovy — may be tied to a slightly higher risk of osteoporosis and gout, according to research presented Monday at the American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons’ annual meeting.Dr.
